scripts.build: pnpm --filter @cchistory/domain build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/source-adapters build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/storage build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/presentation build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/tui build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && chmod +x dist/index.js
scripts.test: pnpm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --import ../../scripts/install-node-sqlite-warning-filter.mjs --test --test-concurrency=1 dist/index.test.js
